'''mangafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readiness|readiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readiness|readiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mangafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mængæfæth|mængæfæth]] || [[word:mængæfæj|mængæfæj]] || [[word:mængæfæsh|mængæfæsh]] || [[word:mængæfæ|mængæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mangangafath|mangangafath]] || [[word:mangangafaj|mangangafaj]] || [[word:mangangafash|mangangafash]] || [[word:mangangafa|mangangafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mangafath|mangafath]] || [[word:mangafaj|mangafaj]] || [[word:mangafash|mangafash]] || [[word:mangafa|mangafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mangaffath|mangaffath]] || [[word:mangaffaj|mangaffaj]] || [[word:mangaffash|mangaffash]] || [[word:mangaffaf|mangaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mangafatha|mangafatha]] || [[word:mangafaja|mangafaja]] || [[word:mangafasha|mangafasha]] || [[word:mangafaka|mangafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mangafath|mangafath]] || [[word:mangafaj|mangafaj]] || [[word:mangafash|mangafash]] || [[word:mangafa|mangafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mangafathal|mangafathal]] || [[word:mangafajal|mangafajal]] || [[word:mangafashal|mangafashal]] || [[word:mangafakal|mangafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mangafathatha|mangafathatha]] || [[word:mangafajaja|mangafajaja]] || [[word:mangafashasha|mangafashasha]] || [[word:mangafaka|mangafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mangafathan|mangafathan]] || [[word:mangafajan|mangafajan]] || [[word:mangafashan|mangafashan]] || [[word:mangafakan|mangafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mangafathaoro|mangafathaoro]] || [[word:mangafajaoro|mangafajaoro]] || [[word:mangafashaoro|mangafashaoro]] || [[word:mangafakaoro|mangafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
